code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut current = 0
mut has_digit = false
mut negative = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    has_digit = true
  else if b == 45 and not has_digit
    negative = true
  else
    if has_digit
      if negative
        nums = list.push(nums, -current)
      else
        nums = list.push(nums, current)
      end
      current = 0
      has_digit = false
      negative = false
    else
      negative = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has_digit
  if negative
    nums = list.push(nums, -current)
  else
    nums = list.push(nums, current)
  end
end

mut sums: List<Int> = []
mut total = 0
mut j = 0
let count = list.len(nums)
while j < count
  let v = match list.get(nums, j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  total = total + v
  sums = list.push(sums, total)
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
let scount = list.len(sums)
while k < scount
  let v = match list.get(sums, k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println(out)
